phone_presence_notes: Calvin was warm, natural, and closed the call with a personal sign-off using Karen's name; the customer's tone was relaxed and responsive throughout.
top_strength: Strong differentiator coverage — hit No Worries Damage Coverage, Meet Your Mover (movers on website with photos/bios), and On-Time Guarantee cleanly within a short call.
coaching_note: Save Your Ass was fully missed — no consolidation speech, carload tip, or prep-reduces-bill language. The agenda opener was also skipped. Probe for info was light given the call was a follow-up (Cameron had already gathered the inventory), but Calvin could have confirmed key details rather than jumping straight to pricing. For a 7-minute call the differentiator coverage was solid; add SYA and you have a well-rounded short call.
